arguments.message:
Phase 117.3b: System commands in solo chat + MentionPopup + expanded report

- MentionPopup: SYSTEM_COMMANDS section always visible (solo + group)
- Solo chat: @dragon/@doctor/@help intercepted before model routing
- @help/support aliases → doctor (research pipeline)
- Expanded pipeline final report with subtask details
- _dispatch_solo_system_command() via SocketIO emit
- 91 tests passing

Phase 117.3b: System commands in solo chat + MentionPopup + expanded report

- MentionPopup: SYSTEM_COMMANDS section always visible (solo + group)
- Solo chat: @dragon/@doctor/@help intercepted before model routing
- @help/support aliases → doctor (research pipeline)
- Expanded pipeline final report with subtask details
- _dispatch_solo_system_command() via SocketIO emit
- 91 tests passing

Phase 117.4: Dragon Триада (Bronze→Silver→Gold) + Auto-Tier Routing

- MARKER_117.4A: _apply_preset() auto-loads default preset from JSON (fixes Claude fallback bug)
- MARKER_117.4B: Renamed dragon→dragon_silver, dragon_budget→dragon_bronze, dragon_quality→dragon_gold
- MARKER_117.4B: Grok Fast 4.1 ("The Last Samurai") as researcher in all 3 tiers
- MARKER_117.4C: Auto-tier — architect estimates complexity, pipeline switches bronze/silver/gold
- MARKER_117.4C: _resolve_tier() reads _tier_map from model_presets.json
- MARKER_117.4D: 16 new tests (preset names, tier map, auto-load, no Claude in dragon)
- Updated architect prompt with complexity guide (low/medium/high → team tier)
- 115 Phase 117 tests passing

Phase 117.4: Dragon Триада (Bronze→Silver→Gold) + Auto-Tier Routing

- MARKER_117.4A: _apply_preset() auto-loads default preset from JSON (fixes Claude fallback bug)
- MARKER_117.4B: Renamed dragon→dragon_silver, dragon_budget→dragon_bronze, dragon_quality→dragon_gold
- MARKER_117.4B: Grok Fast 4.1 ("The Last Samurai") as researcher in all 3 tiers
- MARKER_117.4C: Auto-tier — architect estimates complexity, pipeline switches bronze/silver/gold
- MARKER_117.4C: _resolve_tier() reads _tier_map from model_presets.json
- MARKER_117.4D: 16 new tests (preset names, tier map, auto-load, no Claude in dragon)
- Updated architect prompt with complexity guide (low/medium/high → team tier)
- 115 Phase 117 tests passing

Phase 118: Move artifact icon to ChatPanel header

- Remove floating icons when chat open (MARKER_118.2B block)
- Remove unused getIconsLeft() function from App.tsx
- Add ChestIcon component to ChatPanel.tsx
- Add artifact button in ChatPanel header next to Scanner
- Button layout: [Artifact] [Scanner] [Position] [Close]

Icons when chat closed remain in top-left next to search bar.

Phase 118: Move artifact icon to ChatPanel header

- Remove floating icons when chat open (MARKER_118.2B block)
- Remove unused getIconsLeft() function from App.tsx
- Add ChestIcon component to ChatPanel.tsx
- Add artifact button in ChatPanel header next to Scanner
- Button layout: [Artifact] [Scanner] [Position] [Close]

Icons when chat closed remain in top-left next to search bar.

Phase 118.2: Double-click support for files and folders

FileCard.tsx:
- Add handleDoubleClick callback
- Double-click on file = open ArtifactWindow
- Double-click on folder = zoom camera (medium)
- Add onDoubleClick to mesh

App.tsx:
- Add event listener for 'vetka-open-artifact-file'
- Opens ArtifactWindow when FileCard dispatches event
